title: duplicated unknown-extension error in compile()
description: In lib.rs compile(), the require extension check has two branches (Form::Str and Form::StringList) that each build the same SieveError inline. Suggested rewrite: extract check_extension(s: &str) -> Result<(), SieveError> and call it from both branches. The StringList branch becomes: for s in v { check_extension(s)?; }
